title: carex tenuiformis
intro: Carex tenuiformis, also known as slender sedge, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial plant native to Eastern Asia, primarily found in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Carex tenuiformis is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
